batches.title: Land Preparation & Planting
protocols: Soil Prep: Incorporate 1-2 inches of compost into the top 6-8 inches of the raised bed.
Base Nutrition: Broadcast 10g/sqm of Complete (14-14-14) fertilizer.
Dimensions: Standardize bed width to 0.9 meters.
Spacing: Plant 3 rows spaced 30cm apart, with plants every 15cm.
Rotation Warning: NEVER plant basil in the same bed in consecutive seasons (Fusarium risk).

monitoring.title: IPM & Disease Defense
protocols: Fungal Threat: Downy Mildew triggers at >85% humidity for >4 hours. Ensure wide spacing.
Trap Crop (Pull): Check perimeter Nasturtiums for Aphid and Whitefly colonization.
Soil Defense (Anchor): Ensure French Marigolds are planted at bed ends to suppress nematodes.
Scent Shield (Push): Verify Chives are growing down the center lines to mask basil scent.

pos.title: Post-Harvest & Wholesale
protocols: Harvest Timing: Cut late afternoon or very early morning.
Danger: DO NOT drop below 10°C. Cellular membranes will collapse causing blackening.
Packaging: Use micro-perforated bags to prevent moisture loss.
